decks.notes: The deck focuses on using powerful creatures with abilities that can disrupt the opponent's game plan while also benefiting from reanimation spells to cheat them into play quickly. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps dig for combo pieces, while Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Archon of Cruelty can dominate the battlefield. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to control the game. With a mix of control elements and powerful creatures, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and versatile strategy.

This deck focuses on playing powerful disruptive creatures and locking down the opponent with cards like Trinisphere and Magus of the Moon. By aggressively applying pressure and denying the opponent resources, this deck aims to establish dominance early in the game. With a mix of disruptive elements and aggressive creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their game plan. It utilizes a mix of fast mana and land destruction to disrupt the opponent's strategy while pushing its own game plan forward.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while deploying efficient threats to apply pressure. It utilizes Death & Taxes strategy of taxing the opponent's resources with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Wasteland while using creatures like Stoneforge Mystic and Skyclave Apparition to control the board. The deck also includes a flicker package to generate value and disrupt the opponent's board state. The goal is to outvalue the opponent and close out the game quickly with a combination of disruptive elements and efficient beaters.

The main concept of this deck is to maintain tempo by efficiently disrupting the opponent's game plan while deploying threats in the form of creatures like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf. The deck aims to control the game through a combination of disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push, backed up by powerful counter spells such as Force of Will. The inclusion of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares provides additional card advantage and versatility to adapt to different situations. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive and disruptive strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Cephalid Illusionist combo with Nomads en-Kor to quickly mill through cards and put key pieces like Narcomoeba and Thassa's Oracle into play to win the game. The deck also utilizes powerful disruptive spells like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to protect the combo and control the board. The inclusion of cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Teferi, Time Raveler provide additional value and flexibility to the deck. The mana base supports the combo with fetch lands and powerful lands like Urza's Saga to further enhance its effectiveness.

The deck focuses on using lands as both a control mechanism and a win condition. It utilizes cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration to quickly ramp up mana production while disrupting the opponent's resources with Wasteland and Boseiju, Who Endures. The deck also includes the Dark Depths/Thespian's Stage combo as a powerful win condition. Additionally, cards like Swords to Plowshares and Pithing Needle provide additional control elements, making it difficult for the opponent to establish a board presence. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through strategic land management.

This control lands deck aims to disrupt the opponent while building up its own resources. It uses cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam to manipulate the land base and gain advantage. Cards like Swords to Plowshares provide removal while cards like Malevolent Rumble disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes utility lands like The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale and Maze of Ith to control the board. Overall, the deck aims to control the game through land manipulation and disruption, ultimately winning the game through powerful land synergies.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent alongside efficient spells like Lightning Bolt and Daze to quickly apply pressure on the opponent. It also utilizes counterspells like Force of Will and card draw/filtering cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to control the game. The inclusion of Boomerang Basics helps disrupt the opponent's tempo while Mishra's Bauble provides additional card advantage. The mana base consists of dual lands like Island','','');">Volcanic Island and fetch lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's plans while quickly deploying efficient threats to control the tempo of the game. Utilizing powerful spells like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck looks to quickly close out the game with threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent. By applying constant pressure on the opponent and disrupting their strategy, the deck aims to stay one step ahead and secure victory through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The deck focuses on using lands as control elements, utilizing cards like Crop Rotation and Life from the Loam to optimize land plays. It also includes disruption spells like Malevolent Rumble and Disruptor Flute to slow down the opponent's strategy. The main win condition is through the Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage combo, creating a powerful 20/20 indestructible creature. The deck also includes utility lands like Bojuka Bog and Karakas to deal with graveyard strategies and problematic creatures. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through efficient land manipulation and control.

The main concept of this Legacy Aggro Death's Shadow deck is to aggressively play powerful threats like Death's Shadow and Murktide Regent while disruptively controlling the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Daze. The deck aims to pressure the opponent early on with efficient creatures and disruptive spells, taking advantage of Tamiyo's ability to draw cards and generate value over the course of the game. The land base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and allow for consistent mana development.

The main concept of this Legacy Combo - Show and Tell deck is to quickly ramp into playing powerful, game-changing spells such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Omniscience by utilizing cards like Ancient Tomb and Show and Tell. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect your combo pieces, as well as card draw with Brainstorm and Cunning Wish. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a quick and powerful win condition while disrupting their game plan with counterspells and removal.

The deck focuses on using cards like Show and Tell and Omniscience to cheat big creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play early, overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats. The deck also utilizes Cunning Wish to tutor for specific answers, while running disruption like Force of Will to protect its combo pieces. The goal is to quickly ramp into big threats and win the game before the opponent can establish their own game plan, making it a fast and explosive combo deck in the Legacy format.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of aggressive creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, along with efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Unholy Heat. By utilizing cards like Delver of Secrets and Cori-Steel Cutter to apply pressure early on, coupled with countermagic like Force of Will and Daze to protect key threats, this deck aims to control the tempo of the game and outpace the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board through counterspells, removal spells, and bounce effects, while also generating card advantage and tempo through card draw and mana denial. It utilizes Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to generate card advantage and Murktide Regent as a finisher. Quantum Riddler and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional card selection and filtering. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards a win condition, creating a strong and strategic control game.
